lofi.name: Lo-Fi Chill
lofi.prompt: A chill lo-fi beat with warm keys, soft vinyl crackle, laid-back drums and a mellow bassline

ambient.name: Ambient Pad
ambient.prompt: Ethereal ambient pad with evolving textures, soft piano motifs and distant reverb, cinematic and calm

epic.name: Epic Orchestral
epic.prompt: Large orchestral score with powerful horns, driving strings, percussion and cinematic tension

pop.name: Pop Hook
pop.prompt: Upbeat pop song with catchy synth hooks, rhythmic guitars, driving drums and a singable vocal melody
